name: the dog-walker walkthrough regenerates a fully cited architecture design
command:
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/examples/dog-walker-marketplace/regenerate.sh --out out 2>/dev/null
ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read("out/02-technical-requirements.json")); abort unless (d["needs_grounding"]||[]).empty? && d["concerns_total"].to_i>=30' && echo regenerated-fully-cited 1>&2
